# Healthy Mind Specialists — Full Details

> Integrative psychological services providing individual, couples, family, and group therapy in Tampa, FL. Compassionate, evidence-based mental health care located in Riverview, Florida.

---

## About Healthy Mind Specialists

Healthy Mind Specialists is a mental health practice dedicated to providing integrative, compassionate psychological services in the Tampa Bay area. Located at 11906 Boyette Rd, Riverview, FL 33569, we serve clients from Riverview, Brandon, Valrico, Lithia, and the greater Tampa metropolitan area.

We believe that change begins at the end of your comfort zone. Our team of licensed psychologists and mental health counselors combine evidence-based therapies to support personal growth, healing, and lasting resilience. We care about you, your family, and your story. You can trust that we will treat you with respect, dignity, and compassion in every interaction, while maintaining the highest standards for integrity and ethics.

**Contact Information:**
- Phone: (813) 609-2034
- Address: 11906 Boyette Rd, Riverview, FL 33569
- Website: https://healthymindspecialists.com

---

## Services We Provide

### Integrative Care
Our flagship approach combines multiple evidence-based therapies tailored to each client's unique needs. Rather than adhering to a single modality, our clinicians draw from a range of therapeutic frameworks to create a holistic treatment plan that addresses emotional, cognitive, and behavioral dimensions of mental health.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/services

### Individual Therapy
One-on-one sessions focused on personal growth, healing, and resilience. Individual therapy provides a private, confidential space where you can explore your thoughts, emotions, and behaviors with a licensed professional. Sessions are tailored to your specific concerns and goals.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/services/individual-therapy

### Group Therapy
Shared healing experiences guided by licensed professionals in a safe, supportive space. Group therapy offers the unique benefit of connecting with others who share similar challenges, reducing isolation and building community while developing new coping skills.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/services/group-therapy

### Psychological Evaluations
Comprehensive assessments to inform diagnosis, treatment planning, and personal growth. Our psychological evaluations use validated testing instruments to provide a thorough understanding of cognitive, emotional, and behavioral functioning.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/services/evaluations

---

## Specialties

### Mindfulness & Wellness Coaching
Build present-moment awareness and sustainable habits for lasting mental wellness. Our mindfulness programs incorporate meditation, breathwork, and cognitive techniques to help you develop a more grounded, intentional relationship with your thoughts and emotions.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/services/mindfulness

### Therapy for Self-Esteem
Rediscover your self-worth and develop a compassionate inner dialogue. Self-esteem therapy addresses negative self-perception, perfectionism, and self-criticism by building a healthier relationship with yourself through evidence-based therapeutic techniques.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/services/self-esteem

---

## Conditions We Treat

### Counseling for Anxiety
Learn to manage worry, panic, and restlessness with proven therapeutic techniques. We work with clients experiencing generalized anxiety disorder, panic disorder, phobias, and chronic worry using CBT, mindfulness-based approaches, and other evidence-based methods.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/conditions/anxiety

### Life Transitions
Navigate change with confidence — career shifts, loss, relocation, and new chapters. Life transitions can be overwhelming, and therapy provides tools and support to adapt, process emotions, and build resilience during times of significant change.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/conditions/life-transitions

### Obsessive Compulsive Disorder (OCD)
Evidence-based OCD treatment including Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP) and cognitive behavioral therapy. Our clinicians are experienced in treating the full spectrum of OCD presentations, from intrusive thoughts to compulsive behaviors.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/conditions/ocd

### Social Anxiety Disorder
Overcome social fears and rebuild confidence in professional and personal settings. Treatment for social anxiety includes graduated exposure, cognitive restructuring, and social skills development to help you engage more fully in your life.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/conditions/social-anxiety

---

## Our Team

### Dr. Maria A. Ruiz, PsyD — Licensed Psychologist
Dr. Ruiz helps clients uncover patterns, understand their emotions, and create meaningful change. As a licensed psychologist, she brings extensive training and clinical experience to her work with individuals seeking personal growth and healing.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/staff/maria-ruiz

### Kiyomi Taylor, LMHC — Licensed Mental Health Counselor
Kiyomi offers support, insight, and practical tools for healing from trauma, stress, and self-doubt. As a licensed mental health counselor, she is dedicated to providing a safe, nonjudgmental space where clients can explore their challenges and develop effective coping strategies.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/staff/kiyomi-taylor

### Dr. Asia Wardlaw, PsyD — Licensed Psychologist
Dr. Wardlaw specializes in psychological testing that reveals answers, supports treatment planning, and builds long-term understanding. Her expertise in comprehensive psychological evaluations helps clients and their treatment teams make informed decisions.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/staff/asia-wardlaw

---

## Getting Started

### Frequently Asked Questions
Find answers to common questions about therapy, what to expect during your first visit, confidentiality, and more.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/get-started/faqs

### Rates & Insurance
Learn about our session rates, accepted insurance plans, and payment options. We strive to make quality mental health care accessible.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/get-started/insurance

### Request an Appointment
Ready to take the first step? Request an appointment online and our team will reach out to schedule your initial consultation.

URL: https://healthymindspecialists.com/get-started
